description: MNDA review playbook — structured clause-by-clause criteria for AI-assisted review

known_standards.name: Bonterms Mutual NDA
known_standards.notes: Industry-standard balanced mutual NDA. Acceptable as-is in most cases.

known_standards.name: Common Paper Mutual NDA
known_standards.notes: Industry-standard balanced mutual NDA. Acceptable as-is in most cases.

known_standards.name: Common Paper One-Way NDA
known_standards.notes: One-way NDA from Common Paper — verify direction of obligations before accepting.

checks.name: Mutual Structure
checks.guidance: The NDA must impose confidentiality obligations on both parties equally.
checks.preferred_language: Each Party agrees to hold the other Party's Confidential Information in strict confidence.
checks.redline_suggestion: Change to mutual obligations on both parties.

checks.name: Survival Period
checks.guidance: Preferred survival period is 3-5 years post-termination. Perpetual obligations are RED.
checks.preferred_language: The obligations of confidentiality shall survive termination for five (5) years.
checks.redline_suggestion: Replace survival period with 5 years post-termination.

checks.name: Governing Law
checks.guidance: Preferred jurisdictions are Delaware or California.
checks.preferred_language: This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware.
checks.redline_suggestion: Change governing law to Delaware or California.

checks.name: Injunctive Relief
checks.guidance: The agreement must include a clause allowing injunctive relief for breach.
checks.preferred_language: Each Party acknowledges that any breach may cause irreparable harm entitling the non-breaching Party to seek equitable relief.

checks.name: Standard of Care
checks.guidance: Standard should be reasonable care. Absolute protection obligations are unacceptable.
checks.preferred_language: Each Party shall protect the other's Confidential Information using at least the same degree of care as its own, but no less than reasonable care.
checks.redline_suggestion: Replace absolute protection obligation with reasonable care standard.

checks.name: Exceptions to Confidentiality
checks.guidance: Must include standard carve-outs: publicly available, prior knowledge, independent development, legal compulsion.
checks.preferred_language: Confidential Information excludes information that: (a) is publicly available; (b) was known prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed; or (d) is legally required to be disclosed.

checks.name: Return or Destruction
checks.guidance: Agreement should include obligation to return or destroy confidential information.
checks.preferred_language: Upon request or termination, each Party shall return or destroy all Confidential Information and certify such destruction in writing.
checks.redline_suggestion: Add return/destruction clause with written certification.

checks.name: No-Solicitation Clause
checks.guidance: Company preference is to exclude no-solicitation clauses. If present, propose deletion.
checks.redline_suggestion: Delete no-solicitation clause — this should not be included in a mutual NDA.

checks.name: Unilateral NDA Detection
checks.guidance: If one side is consistently Disclosing Party and other is Receiving Party without mutual obligations, it is a one-way NDA.
checks.preferred_language: Each Party may act as both a disclosing and receiving party under this Agreement.
checks.redline_suggestion: Convert to mutual NDA structure with obligations on both parties.

checks.name: Definition of Confidential Information
checks.guidance: There must be a clear, scoped definition. Overly broad definitions create unreasonable obligations.
checks.preferred_language: Confidential Information means any non-public information designated as confidential or that reasonably should be understood to be confidential.
checks.redline_suggestion: Narrow the definition to specifically designated or reasonably understood non-public information.

checks.name: Agreement Term / Duration
checks.guidance: Preferred term is 1-3 years with confidentiality surviving 5 years post-termination.
checks.preferred_language: This Agreement shall remain in effect for two (2) years from the Effective Date, unless earlier terminated by either Party upon thirty (30) days written notice.
checks.redline_suggestion: Set agreement term to 2 years with 30 days notice termination right.

checks.name: Permitted Disclosures (Need to Know)
checks.guidance: Disclosure must be limited to employees, contractors, advisors with need to know, bound by equivalent obligations.
checks.preferred_language: Each Party may disclose to its employees, contractors, and advisors who need to know and are bound by confidentiality obligations at least as protective as this Agreement.
checks.redline_suggestion: Limit permitted disclosures to need-to-know personnel bound by equivalent confidentiality obligations.
